faqs.question: Why are rats so common in Lindenhurst?
faqs.answer: Lindenhurst's location along the Great South Bay and numerous canals provides rats with water sources and harborage areas. The mix of older homes, waterfront properties, and established vegetation creates ideal nesting conditions, especially during colder months when rats seek indoor shelter.
